name: Shokz OpenFit

longDescription: Shokz OpenFit is our best open-ear earbuds for all-day wear. Shokz OpenFit uses directional speakers for open-ear listening with none of the vibration of bone conduction. Ultra-comfortable for all-day wear. After extensive hands-on testing, we found it delivers on its promises with no vibration — true air conduction.
pros: Good sound quality with decent bass
verdict: Shokz OpenFit is our top recommendation for open-ear earbuds for all-day wear. No vibration — true air conduction.
